visual_description: In a dimly lit, stone-walled corridor, a group of young people are gathered. The camera focuses on a young man with dark hair and glasses, seen from the back, as he turns to speak to a young woman with long, reddish-brown hair. To her right, another young man with dark hair looks on with a concerned expression. In the background, other figures are visible, some ascending a grand staircase. The Chinese text "金妮 纳威! 你们还好吗?" appears at the bottom of the screen, with a watermark in the top right corner. The audio opens with a tense, dramatic orchestral score, creating a sense of urgency and concern. A young man's voice, filled with alarm and worry, calls out, "金妮 纳威! 你们还好吗?" He then turns to another person, his voice rising in pitch and pace with excitement and relief, "你们还好吗?" The camera angle shifts slightly, showing the three main characters more clearly. The young man with glasses, Harry, is now facing the young woman, Ginny, and the other young man, Neville. Harry gestures with his hand as he speaks, his expression urgent. Ginny looks at him with a worried and slightly confused look,
